title: viburnum carlesii var. bitchiuense
intro: Viburnum carlesii var. bitchiuense is a variant of the Korean Spice Viburnum, a shrub native to China and Japan, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum carlesii var. bitchiuense include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting respiratory health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall well-being and to treat various health conditions.
